MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Zachariah Hansen, Esq. (415-495-7800) of the Arns Law Firm for Plaintiff.
James Hetherington, Esq. (415-705-0410) of Goodman Neuman Hamilton for Defendant Plant Construction Company.
Joel Holman, Esq. (415-446-8539) of for Defendant Old Republic General.

RULING - ARGUED. The Court announces it's tentative ruling: The Intervenor's motion is granted, the Intervenor has the right to intervene. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

INTERVENOR ROBERT A. BOTHMAN, INC. Notice Of Motion and Motion For Leave Of Court To Intervene is Granted. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
